ab: akay, i tjumaq sun?
en: akay, are you home?

ab: izua, kilimu a ljitaladju.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: akay, i tjumaq sun?
en: akay, are you home?

ab: neka ti akay i tjumaq ! ti ljeljeng aken, anema su sikimkim? nu mangetjez ku tjumaljay anga ti akay.
ch: B:akay不在家耶!我是ljeljeng，有什麼事嗎?回來我會轉告akay。
en: akay is not at home. I am ljeljeng. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: tima mun?
en: Who are you?

ab: vuvu, ti savan akay a men, pusaladj amen a semuqeljev.
ch: B:奶奶，我們是savan 和 akay，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are savan and akay, please open the door for us.

ab: tima?
en: Who is it?

ab: ti buya ken, kemikim aken tjai kapi
en: I am buya, I am here for kapi.

ab: vuvu, mangtjez a ken paljilji tjanusun.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: sicuayan nangata su pinantjezan, singelit aken aravac tjanusun.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: savan, mangetjez aken kemin tjanusun a kivanvan.
en: savan, I am here to play with you.

ab: kilimu ljitaladju, cuayanga ken a kemaljavaljava tjanusun.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: aicu u talem a vurasi, paqayami a keman.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看。
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: aicu vurasi qaljemeqem angata.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: idu! aicu u talem a kudamunu, paqayami a keman.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: aicu a kudamunu qaljemeqem angata.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: qiladju! aicu inika kinusulian a puday tiaken a na temalem kanu pay !
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: u! ca puday qaljemeqem angata.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: sakeman sun ta tjanes?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: ika keman na en ta tjanes, keman na en ta ringku.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: uli keman sun ta pingkan?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: ui, tjengelay en.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: u sitjuljakan sun ta kudamunu sipakan tjanusun.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: masalu, aicu a kudamunu liaw qetim.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: malap aken ta zaljum sipatekel tjanusun.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: masalu.
en: Thank you.

ab: su liaw keman, liaw ku sinandjamay.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: u! salulum angata saka sanguaq tauta.
ch: B:嗚!真的很香而且也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: su liaw keman, izuanan liaw imaza.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: ika masiaq anga ken yu!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: su liaw keman, izuanan liaw imaza.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: liaw anga u kinan, dikinay anga keman.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
